description: 94 CVEs removed from website between backup (2026-03-14) and current. Need audit to verify deep verifier correctness.

completed.note: Blamed commit never touched blamed file, pr_body_keyword false signal

AI code inherited existing unsafe pattern, didn't create it
FN - Claude Opus 4.5 introduced path traversal. Deep verifier timed out, fallback cached as UNLIKELY. Fixed in 7cd7df4.
Same SSRF as CVE-2026-28467, blamed commit never touched vulnerable files
AI commit was safe at the time, human later added workspaceOnly but missed this path
Vuln created by human, AI commit was adding security measures
AI commit and vulnerability are independent code paths
Ghost blame - AI commit never modified the blamed file
AI commit only blamed on import statement, vuln in function body by human
AI commit touched config schema, vulnerability in webhook handling not introduced by AI
Needs deeper investigation, possible partial contribution
GitHub Copilot commit not causally related to the vulnerability

systemic_finding.description: 240 BIC verdicts have steps_completed=[] indicating timeout, but only 35 are actual fallback verdicts (identifiable via 'Fallback verdict' in reasoning + empty evidence). 5.9% fallback rate.
systemic_finding.fix_applied: generate_web_data.py: _is_fallback_verdict() detects and ignores timeout fallbacks, treating them as unverified (benefit of the doubt)
systemic_finding.impact: 17 CVEs restored to website from 56 to 73
systemic_finding.reverification_needed: 35 BICs with fallback verdicts should be re-verified with the pipeline
